message: chore: add golangci-lint config and Makefile targets

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+run:
+  timeout: 3m
+  tests: true
+  skip-dirs:
+    - vendor
+
+linters:
+  enable:
+    - govet
+    - staticcheck
+    - revive
+    - errcheck
+    - gofmt
+    - goimports
+  disable-all: false
+
+linters-settings:
+  revive:
+    severity: warning
+    rules:
+      - name: exported
+        severity: warning
+      - name: var-naming
+        severity: warning
+      - name: indent-error-flow
+        severity: warning
+  gofmt:
+    simplify: true
+
+issues:
+  exclude-use-default: false
+  max-issues-per-linter: 0
+  max-same-issues: 0

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+GOBIN ?= $(shell go env GOPATH)/bin
+
+.PHONY: lint fmt test
+
+fmt:
+	gofmt -w -s .
+
+lint:
+	@command -v golangci-lint >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "golangci-lint not installed. Install via: brew install golangci-lint"; exit 1; }
+	golangci-lint run
+
+test:
+	go test ./...
